contract.intent: Render a single tier-map node (one logic block at any tier 0-6) as a constrained SVG node element: shape, fill from CNAE, label, and drift state.

inputs.name: tier_node
inputs.constraint: tier 0-6, cnae triple, verification status, conformance flag, x/y

postconditions: the node renders even when tier_node is non-conformant — a broken record becomes a red drift node, never a render failure
invariants: pure: same tier_node + tokens always yield identical SVG
failure_modes: non-conformant tier_node — handled as drift styling, not an error

semantics.operation: Map a TierNode and the brand token sheet into one constrained SVG <g> node element.

notes: Authored intent; structural seed of ecosystem-map.html drill-down pattern, brand-enforced.

contract.intent: Render the stroke color for a tier-map edge from the CNAE relationship it represents (depends_on, composed_from, lineage source_ref).

inputs.name: cnae_relationship
inputs.constraint: one of: depends_on | composed_from | lineage_source | compatible_pair

outputs.name: edge_color
outputs.constraint: a brand palette token, never a raw hex literal

preconditions: cnae_relationship is a recognized edge kind
postconditions: every relationship kind maps to a distinct, brand-resolved color
invariants: color is always a brand_tokens entry
failure_modes: unrecognized relationship — falls back to the muted token, never an error

semantics.operation: Map an edge relationship kind onto a brand color token for SVG edge stroke.

notes: Authored intent; edges colored by CNAE relationship per COMMAND_STATION.md.

contract.intent: Render a verification-status pill for a logic block: a small labeled chip colored by the block's verification.status.

inputs.name: verification_status
inputs.constraint: one of: draft | candidate | canonical | unknown

postconditions: an unrecognized or missing status renders as the 'unknown' pill, never a render failure
failure_modes: missing status — handled as 'unknown', not an error

semantics.operation: Map a verification status onto a labeled, brand-colored status pill.

contract.intent: Render a drift badge: a red marker shown on any record that fails store conformance (a legacy flat record, a missing required field, a broken envelope), with a short reason.

inputs.name: conformance_result
inputs.constraint: conformant flag + list of drift reasons

outputs.name: badge_markup
outputs.constraint: one <span> badge; empty string when conformant

postconditions: a conformant record yields an empty badge
a non-conformant record yields a drift_red badge naming the first drift reason

semantics.operation: Map a conformance result onto a red drift badge or an empty marker.

notes: Authored intent; v0 renders broken records as red drift instead of crashing — COMMAND_STATION.md v0 definition.
